title: Marium's Soulslike Weaponry - All the Smites
description: This Datapack adds the Spell "Smite" from spellblades n such to a few select Weapons
body:
This Datapack adds Smite to the following weapons:

*   silver sword
*   moonlight shortsword
*   kirkhammer
*   holy moonlight sword
*   dawnbreaker
*   bluemoon shortsword

While this Datapack does nothing on its own, using it with Marium's Soulslike weaponry and Spellblades n such, these weapons can become quite powerful tools of defeating your enemy!  
Initially made for Prominence II, feel free to use this in your own pack.
